subject: Change VFC composition to use the public database (MariaDB Galera)
commit_message:
Change VFC composition to use the public database (MariaDB Galera)

Change-Id: I4258dd7c34c76706651080792e55edf2a5c58a7b
Issue-ID: VFC-1600
Signed-off-by: yangyan <yangyanyj@chinamobile.com>
[Use common secret template]
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

Patch Set 4:

hi, Krzysztof Opasiak, today we verified this change in our lab env, and when we deploy it, we found the pod dev-vfc-config-config-job-8psnk Init:Error, and when we execute the following command:
kubectl -n onap logs dev-vfc-config-config-job-8psnk -c vfc-config-readiness 
The error shows:
2020-02-12 03:58:49,558 - INFO - Checking if mariadb-galera  is ready
2020-02-12 03:58:49,560 - ERROR - Exception when calling list_namespaced_pod: (403)
Reason: Forbidden
HTTP response headers: HTTPHeaderDict({'Date': 'Wed, 12 Feb 2020 03:58:49 GMT', 'Content-Length': '276', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff'})
HTTP response body: {"kind":"Status","apiVersion":"v1","metadata":{},"status":"Failure","message":"pods is forbidden: User \"system:serviceaccount:onap:default\" cannot list resource \"pods\" in API group \"\" in the namespace \"onap\"","reason":"Forbidden","details":{"kind":"pods"},"code":403}

Do you know how to cause this error? Thanks

Patch Set 4:

In our env, the mariadb-gelera pod already run normally.
